headline: OIL TOPS $100, DOLLAR FIRMS: Gold Holds $4,702 as Iran War Stokes Stagflation Fears Monday
snippet: Gold held near $4,702/oz Monday as the US-Iran conflict drove Brent crude above $100/barrel, intensifying stagflation fears and dollar strength; silver slipped to $75.67/oz despite being up 128% year-over-year, with oil-driven inflation expectations keeping real-rate pressure on both metals.

headline: RECORD CONSENSUS: 31 Analysts Set $4,916/oz Gold Forecast for 2026 — Highest Reuters Poll in History
snippet: A Reuters survey of 31 analysts returned a median 2026 gold forecast of $4,916/oz — the highest annual consensus in Reuters poll history — with most citing central bank buying, U.S. debt concerns, and Federal Reserve independence fears as durable structural drivers that the Iran-conflict setback won't erase.

headline: Bank of America Sees Silver Reaching $135 to $309/oz as Gold-Silver Ratio Sends Historic Signal
snippet: BofA's metals team applied historic gold-silver ratio extremes — 32:1 from 2011 and 14:1 from the 1980 Hunt Brothers squeeze — to current prices, arriving at a $135–$309/oz target range for silver; with the ratio contracting from an April peak above 105, silver at $75 carries significant catch-up potential versus gold.

headline: FED RATE CUT PUSHED TO LATE 2026: War Inflation Shock Leaves 1-in-3 Economists Seeing No Cuts at All
snippet: A Reuters poll of 103 economists found 56 expect the Fed to hold rates through September, with nearly a third now seeing no cuts at all in 2026 — almost double the prior survey — as the Iran war's oil shock drives Q2 PCE inflation forecasts to 3.7%, well above the 2% target and forcing a repricing of rate-cut timing.

headline: ROSS BEATY Raises $297M: Lumina Metals Prices Upsized TSX IPO for Polish Copper-Silver Projects
snippet: Lumina Metals Corp., backed by Pan American Silver founder Ross Beaty, raised a upsized C$406.2M ($297M) in a multiple-times oversubscribed TSX debut, pricing 32.5 million shares at C$12.50; proceeds fund three copper-silver development projects in Poland — the largest Canadian mining IPO in recent memory.

headline: FREEPORT CUTS Copper Guidance 300M lbs on Grasberg Bottleneck; Morgan Stanley Drops FCX to $66
snippet: Freeport-McMoRan slashed 2026 copper output guidance by ~300 million pounds to 3.1 billion after wet-ore handling infrastructure at Grasberg Block Cave will cap capacity near 60% through mid-2027; despite a 21% Q1 EPS beat at record copper prices, Morgan Stanley cut FCX to Equal Weight with a $66 target on the production shortfall.

headline: FURY GOLD Extends Eau Claire OUTSIDE the Block Model: 12.50 g/t Over 7m in Northern Quebec
snippet: Fury Gold's Phase 1 drill program at Eau Claire, Quebec returned 12.50 g/t gold over 7.02m approximately 45m down-plunge from a prior hole and outside the current resource block model — directly raising expansion potential; a fully-financed 15,000–25,000m Phase 2 is expected to run through spring and summer 2026.

headline: NEWMONT RECORD: $3.1B Quarterly Free Cash Flow and $2.90 EPS as Gold Miners Mint Money at $4,700
snippet: Newmont's Q1 2026 results set all-time records: $3.1B quarterly free cash flow (after $1.3B in cash taxes), $2.90 adjusted EPS crushing $2.24 consensus, and 1.3 million ounces produced at $1,029/oz AISC — delivering a $3,600+/oz margin at current prices; the board authorized a fresh $6B share buyback.

headline: KLDC STEPS OUT 75m: 121m at 1.01 g/t Confirms Continuous Gold at Mirado, 8 Holes Pending
snippet: Kirkland Lake Discoveries Corp. (TSXV: KLDC) returned 121m at 1.01 g/t gold including 4.8m at 7.41 g/t in a 75m step-out at its past-producing Mirado property 20km southeast of Kirkland Lake — confirming wide, continuous mineralization at the South Zone with eight additional holes still pending assay.

headline: AGNICO EAGLE GOES ALL-IN ON FINLAND: $3.4B Trio of Deals Consolidates Central Lapland Into 500Koz Hub
snippet: Agnico Eagle entered three definitive agreements to consolidate Finland's Central Lapland Greenstone Belt — acquiring Rupert Resources (~$2.87B) and Aurion Resources (~$481M) plus the Fingold JV — creating a multi-asset, multi-decade regional platform targeting 500,000+ oz/yr annual production within the decade.
